name: kore-framework
description: VS Code extension for the Kore Roblox Luau game framework — autocomplete, diagnostics, type generation, and more.

kore.servicesPath.description: Path to the services directory (relative to workspace root)

kore.controllersPath.description: Path to the controllers directory (relative to workspace root)

kore.typesOutputPath.description: Output path for the generated Types.luau file

kore.koreRequirePath.description: Luau require path for the Kore module (e.g. game.ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Packages.kore)

kore.typesRequirePath.description: Luau require path for the Kore Types module

kore.enableDiagnostics.description: Enable Kore diagnostics (name mismatches, unknown deps, etc.)

kore.generateTypes.description: Auto-generate and update Types.luau on service/controller changes

kore.sharedPath.description: Path to the shared code directory (relative to workspace root)

kore.autoTemplate.description: Auto-populate new .luau files with service/controller templates when created in the services or controllers directory

kore.fuzzyThreshold.description: Fuzzy matching threshold (0 = exact match only, 1 = match anything)

kore.debug.description: Log extension internals to the Kore output channel

kore.triggerPrefix.description: Prefix that triggers Kore autocomplete. Type this at the start of a line followed by a command (e.g. '!require', '!getService').

kore.requireCompletion.maxSuggestions.description: Maximum number of module suggestions shown for !require completions

kore.requireCompletion.useDeepestVariabl.description: Use the deepest defined variable for shorter require paths (e.g. Packages.Module instead of ReplicatedStorage.Shared.Packages.Module)

kore.requireCompletion.autoInsertGetServ.description: Auto-insert 'local Service = game:GetService("Service")' at the top of the file when a require needs it
